complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.自动编程向导第一步 基本信息：产品名称、标签、PCB 尺寸（板长度 / 板宽度）: Auto-Programming Wizard Step 1, Basic Info: product name, labels, and PCB dimensions (board length / width) input
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.上板与拍摄步骤：右侧传送带控制（锁定 / 进板 / 拍摄2D）与相机参数，左侧拼: Conveyor & Capture step: conveyor controls (Lock / PCB In / Capture 2D) and camera parameters on the right, the stitched full PCB image on the left
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.配置自动编程步骤：左侧检测区域绘制工具与拼接图像，右侧拼板 / 检测类型 / 检: Configure Auto-Program step: region-drawing tools and the stitched image on the left, the Panelization / Inspection Types / Auto Programming Parameters / Health Checks collapse panels on the right

introduce/quick_start/index.po.在主页点击 :ui-btn:`训练PCBA`，注册新的 PCBA/产品，进入 :: On the home page, click :ui-btn:`Teach PCBA` to register a new PCBA/product and enter the :ui-tab:`Programming with Wizard`. The wizard has 4 steps: **Basic Info**, **Conveyor & Capture**, **Configure Auto-Program**, and **Add CAD (Optional)**.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.输入 :ui-param:`产品名称`，按需添加 :ui-param:`标签`，: Enter the :ui-param:`Product Name`, add :ui-param:`Labels` as needed, and fill in the known PCB :ui-param:`board length` and :ui-param:`board width` (in mm, usually from the product drawing or SMT work order; the dimensions cannot be changed after the product is created). Click :ui-btn:`Next` when done. Inspection types, parameters, and health checks are not set on this step — they have moved to Step 3, **Configure Auto-Program**.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.选择对应传送带并点击 :ui-btn:`锁定`；在线版本中确认或调整传送带宽度；: Select the conveyor and click :ui-btn:`Lock`; on the online version, confirm or adjust the conveyor width; click :ui-btn:`PCB In` to feed the PCB to the capture area, then click :ui-btn:`Capture 2D Image`. The system acquires the board in tiles with the camera and conveyor and stitches the full PCB image, shown directly on this step. Use a clean, defect-free **Golden board** where possible; if needed, adjust the camera parameters (such as :ui-param:`Exposure time`, :ui-param:`Gain`, :ui-param:`gamma`) and re-capture. Click :ui-btn:`Next` once the stitched image looks right.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.系统显示上一步拼接出的完整图像（只读）。点击 :ui-btn:`定义区域` 框选: The system shows the full image stitched in the previous step (read-only). Click :ui-btn:`Define Region` to box the effective area for auto-programming (usually the whole board; shrink it to exclude fixture/jig edges). In :ui-param:`AI-modelled inspection types` check the items you care about (such as :ui-opt:`Mount`, :ui-opt:`Polarity`, :ui-opt:`Solder`, :ui-opt:`Glue on Pad`, :ui-opt:`IC Lead`, :ui-opt:`Text`), adjust the corresponding parameters under :ui-param:`Auto Programming Parameters` as needed, and set the :ui-param:`Health check`. If the product is panelized, turn on :ui-opt:`Enable panelization` and fill in rows / columns. Click :ui-btn:`Next` when done.
